name: Echidna Wars DX RPG: Boss Rush
description:
CW: Vore, Digestion, Unbirth

An RPG based off of the three bosses of Echidna Wars DX

Boss List:

Highland Worm (Includes Harpy)

Queen Bee (Includes Bee Girl and Unbirth)

Ouroboros

Latest Update: Added locations to the boss fights

After a 3 month hiatus I'm finally back with a new bot. While I was at it, I decided to do some experimenting with the mechanics compared to the Echidna Wars DX RPG. Now there are abilities similar to some of my other bots, but more importantly, there's a completely revamped struggling system with different options to use. Depending on reception, I may end up tweaking it for this bot, and if there's enough positive reception, I might even end up making a 2.0 of my original Echidna Wars DX RPG bot to include some of the new mechanics
creator: HistoricalHello12
